name: Fattoush
recipeIngredient: 4 hard-boiled eggs, peeled and cut into wedges
4 slices of whole wheat bread, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all the salad ingredients and place them in a bowl.
2. Toast the whole wheat bread and rub with cut garlic cloves. Lightly sprinkle with olive oil.
3. Break into small pieces.
4. For the dressing: Combine 1 tablespoon olive oil, 2 teaspoons white wine vinegar, 1 teaspoon chopped fresh parsley, 1 teaspoon dried tarragon, salt, and black pepper in a screw-top jar. Mix well by shaking.
5. Toss the garlic toast and dressing into the salad.
NUTRIENTS PER PORTION: Protein: 11 g Fiber: 6 g Polyunsaturated fat: 2 g Saturated fat: 3 g Vitamins A, B1, B2, B12, C, D, E, F Minerals: Fe, Mg, Zn
CALORIES: 235
SERVES: 4
